meta.title: HookTap | iOS Webhooks for Developers
meta.description: HookTap brings push notifications, widgets, and live updates via webhook to your iPhone. GDPR compliant, no account needed, hosted in Berlin.
meta.ogDescription: Push notifications, widgets, and live updates via webhook to your iPhone.

hero.headline: Your iPhone as a Webhook Receiver. In Real Time.
hero.sub: Send an HTTP POST request to your personal URL – HookTap instantly forwards it as a push notification to your iPhone. No server. No code. No waiting.
hero.curlExample: curl -X POST https://hooks.hooktap.me/webhook/YOUR_ID -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"type":"build","title":"CI succeeded","body":"Staging deploy is live"}'

problem.headline: You deploy, trigger jobs, and never know exactly when something is done.
problem.body: Instead of constantly refreshing tabs and checking logs, HookTap simply sends you a notification to your iPhone. Directly. Reliably. Without overhead.
problem.cta: One URL. One webhook. Know instantly.

how.headline: Get started in under 2 minutes
how.sub: HookTap is ready to use instantly. Copy the URL, add it to your workflow and get notified in real time.
how.urlNote: No registration, no password, no extra setup.
how.curlExample:
curl -X POST https://hooks.hooktap.me/webhook/YOUR_ID \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"type":"build","title":"CI succeeded","body":"Staging deploy is live"}'

steps.title: Download App
steps.text: Install and instantly get your personal webhook URL.

steps.title: Add URL
steps.text: Add it to GitHub Actions, Zapier, n8n, Make, or any script.

steps.title: Receive Push
steps.text: HookTap sends you an iPhone notification within seconds.

features.headline: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
features.sub: HookTap focuses on fast, clear signals for your workflows. No overhead, only features that actually help in day-to-day use.
features.footer: HookTap delivers focused notifications for developers, DevOps teams, and automations.

items.title: Real-Time Push Notifications
items.body: Every incoming webhook lands within seconds as a notification on your lock screen.

items.title: Event Feed
items.body: All received events in chronological order – including payload, timestamp, and read status.

items.title: Payload Preview
items.body: Title, body, and type immediately visible. All fields remain fully accessible in the feed.

items.title: Webhook Sharing
items.body: Generate an invite code and let teammates receive the same events on their devices.

items.title: Home & Lock Screen Widgets
items.body: The latest event always visible on your home and lock screen – updated in real time.

items.title: Live Activity & Dynamic Island
items.body: Active events visible on lock screen and Dynamic Island, ideal for ongoing processes.

items.title: JSON Mapping
items.body: Connect any service — map JSON fields from GitHub, Stripe, Vercel and more directly to your notifications.

items.title: Up to 3 Webhooks
items.body: Custom names, icons, and colors per webhook including feed filtering.

why.headline: The right tool for the job.
why.sub: Other solutions work – but they weren't built for this.

alternatives.title: Discord / Telegram / Slack
items: Bot tokens, webhooks, invite links – setup overhead
Alerts get buried in chat history
Requires a shared channel or account

alternatives.title: Email Alerts
items: Not real-time – delivery delays are common
Notifications pile up and go unread
Overkill setup for a simple signal

alternatives.title: Enterprise Tools
items: Built for ops teams, not solo devs
Way too much for a simple push

hooktap.title: HookTap: One URL. One POST. Done.
items: One HTTP POST → iPhone push in seconds
No server, no bot, no account required
Ready in under 2 minutes – free forever
Private by design – hosted in Germany

useCases.headline: Who uses HookTap – and for what?
useCases.sub: Define your signals and get notified exactly when something important happens in your workflows.

groups.title: Developers & DevOps
items: Server error or down alert → Notification

groups.title: Monitoring & Alerts

Grafana alert triggered → Notification on iPhone

compatibility.headline: Works with everything that speaks HTTP.

pricing.headline: Simple. Transparent. Fair.
pricing.sub: Choose the plan that fits your workflow. Upgrade anytime.

monthly.label: Pro – Monthly
features: ✓ Up to 3 webhooks with icons & colors

pricing.footer: Payment via your Apple account. No external account needed. Subscription cancellable anytime via iOS settings.

items.a: A webhook is an automated HTTP request triggered by an event. HookTap receives it and forwards it as a push notification to your iPhone.
No. With Zapier, Make, n8n, GitHub, and similar tools, you just need to enter your HookTap URL. For cURL scripts, minimal knowledge helps.
On first launch, an anonymous account is automatically created. You instantly get your personal URL – no email or password required.
Events are securely stored on servers in Berlin and only displayed on your device. The URL is not guessable. Account and data can be deleted at any time.

items.q: How many events can I receive?
items.a: In the Free plan, the last 20 events are visible, in the Pro plan 500. Incoming webhooks are unlimited in both plans.

items.q: What can the HookTap Desktop apps (Mac & Windows) do?
items.a: The HookTap Desktop apps are your live webhook clients: they connect via a 6-digit code to your iPhone app, display incoming events in real time, send new events as native system notifications, allow disconnecting and reconnecting your device at any time, and include built-in auto-updates.

items.q: Can I share a webhook with my team?
items.a: Yes. In the Webhooks tab, swipe right on any webhook and tap Share. A unique 8-character invite code is generated (valid for 15 minutes). Share the code with a colleague – they redeem it via 'Enter Share Code' in their Webhooks tab and immediately start receiving push notifications for all events on that webhook. Owners can revoke access anytime; viewers can leave at any time.

cta.headline: Start now. For free.
cta.sub: Your personal webhook URL is waiting – ready in less than a minute.
cta.noAccount: No account. No password. No credit card.

footer.description: HookTap brings push notifications, widgets, and live updates via webhook directly to your iPhone. Simple, fast, and secure.

meta.title: Developer Guide | HookTap
meta.description: Learn how to send webhook events to your iPhone with HookTap – step-by-step guide with code examples.

dev.title: Integrate HookTap in Minutes
dev.subtitle: Send HTTP POST requests to your personal URL and receive them as real-time push notifications on your iPhone.

what.title: What is HookTap?
what.body: HookTap turns your iPhone into a real-time webhook receiver. Every HTTP POST request sent to your personal URL is instantly delivered as a push notification to your device – no server, no polling, no extra setup.

create.title: Create your webhook
create.step1Body: Download HookTap from the App Store. On first launch, an anonymous account is created automatically – no email or password needed.
create.step2Body: Your personal webhook URL is shown immediately inside the app. Copy it and use it anywhere that can send HTTP requests.
create.urlNote: No registration. No password. Ready instantly.

send.title: Send your first event
send.subtitle: POST a JSON payload to your webhook URL. The event arrives on your iPhone within seconds.
send.fieldTitleDesc: Notification title displayed on the lock screen

types.title: How events are delivered
types.subtitle: Every incoming webhook is processed through all three channels simultaneously.

items.title: Push Notification
items.desc: Appears instantly on the lock screen and as a banner. Works even when the app is in the background or closed.

items.title: Event Log
items.desc: Stored chronologically in the in-app feed with full payload, timestamp, and read status.

items.title: Widget Update
items.desc: The latest event updates your Home Screen and Lock Screen widget in real time (Pro).

platforms.title: Available on all your devices
platforms.subtitle: HookTap works on iPhone and extends to your desktop via native Mac and Windows apps.

items.name: iOS
items.desc: The primary app. Receives webhook events, shows push notifications, manages your URLs, and displays the full event feed.

items.name: macOS
items.desc: Native Mac app that connects to your iPhone via a 6-digit pairing code. Displays events in real time with macOS system notifications.

items.name: Windows
items.desc: Native Windows app with the same real-time event display and system notifications. Pairs with your iPhone app in seconds.

modal.title: Get webhook URLs
modal.instruction: Open the HookTap iOS App → Settings → Connect PC / Mac
modal.codeExpiry: The code is valid for 5 minutes and is only used for this request.
modal.copyInstruction: Copy the URL and use it in your integrations.

errors.invalidCode: Invalid code. Please check your input.
errors.expiredCode: Code expired. Please generate a new one in the iOS app.
